query_title: Queen of Spades: Through the Looking Glass

recommendations.title: Look Away
recommendations.overview: A timid and socially alienated 17-year-old high school student's life is turned upside down when she switches places with her sinister mirror image.

recommendations.title: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: In post–War England, a writer and sometime-ghost hunter investigates a reported haunting at a boys boarding school.

recommendations.title: Down a Dark Hall
recommendations.overview: Kit, a troubled girl, is sent to the exclusive Blackwood boarding school, where she discovers that only four other female students have been admitted to learn the four pillars of knowledge under the ominous wing of the mysterious headmistress Madame

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Disquiet
recommendations.overview: After a near-fatal car accident, Sam wakes to discover he is trapped in an abandoned hospital by mysterious and sinister forces that have no intention of letting him leave…

recommendations.title: School Life
recommendations.overview: In one of the poorest areas of Paris, a school counselor devotes herself to working with disadvantaged students, while facing challenges of her own.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.

recommendations.title: Wolfen
recommendations.overview: A New York City cop and an expert criminologist trying to solve a series of grisly deaths in which the victims have seemingly been maimed by feral animals discover a sinister connection between the crimes and an old legend.

recommendations.title: The Pool
recommendations.overview: International students at an elite Prague school are stalked and murdered by a masked killer while holding a party in an abandoned water park.

recommendations.title: Hungerford
recommendations.overview: The lives of a group of teenagers are turned upside down when their town is taken over by sinister forces.
